23-capstone.rationale: Open-ended capstone — no shipped exercises. The learner builds the project in their chosen language; py/ and ts/ are theirs to fill. Language-agnostic by design.
23-capstone.target_milestone: n/a — intentional; the capstone is language-neutral, not a parity gap
23-capstone.equivalent_path: The M1–M6 milestone plan is language-neutral and draws on modules that ship both Python and TypeScript, so either language is a first-class path to the same outcomes.

10-image-generation.rationale: Full Python+TypeScript parity at the module level; Task 4 intentionally diverges by design — Python takes the 🔴 maths path (toy diffusion sampler), TypeScript takes the 🔴 responsibility path (safety/attribution/evaluation). Documented in the module README.
10-image-generation.target_milestone: delivered — Tasks 1–3 reach parity (deterministic offline stub for CI); the Task 4 split is permanent, not a backlog item
10-image-generation.equivalent_path: Tasks 1–3 are equivalent in both languages via the IMAGE_STUB offline path; Task 4's two 🔴 variants are complementary depth paths that meet the same learning objective from different angles.
